    pub launch: bool,
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x > 0.0 {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            4
        }
    } else if x < 0.0 {
        if y > 0.0 {
            2
        } else {
            3
        }
    } else {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            3
        }
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(r) =
            circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2])
        {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let q = params.Q_PTS;
    if q > n {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - q {
        let mut quadrants = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q {
            quadrants.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > params.QUADS {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, _params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let np = params.N_PTS;
    if n < 3 || np > n || np < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - np {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + np - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + np - 1];

        let same = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..np - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, params.DIST) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - a - b - 1 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let c = params.C_PTS;
    let d = params.D_PTS;
    if n < 5 || c + d > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - c - d - 2 {
        let j = i + c + 1;
        let k = j + d + 1;
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - e - f - 2 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let g = params.G_PTS;
    if n < 3 || g > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - g - 2 {
        let j = i + g + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn lic14(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_outside = false;
    let mut has_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=n - a - b - 2 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                has_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == LT || realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == EQ {
                has_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            has_outside = true;
        }
    }
    has_outside && has_inside
}

fn lic15(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..=n - e - f - 2 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn compute_cmv(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(x, y, n, params),
        lic2(x, y, n, params),
        lic3(x, y, n, params),
        lic4(x, y, n, params),
        lic5(x, y, n, params),
        lic6(x, y, n, params),
        lic7(x, y, n, params),
        lic8(x, y, n, params),
        lic9(x, y, n, params),
        lic10(x, y, n, params),
        lic11(x, y, n, params),
        lic12(x, y, n, params),
        lic13(x, y, n, params),
        lic14(x, y, n, params),
        lic15(x, y, n, params),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];

    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i != j {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = Vec::with_capacity(15);
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv.push(true);
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {

                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {

    for i in 0..15 {

        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())

    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x > 0.0 {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            4
        }
    } else if x < 0.0 {
        if y > 0.0 {
            2
        } else {
            3
        }
    } else {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            3
        }
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(r) =
            circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2])
        {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let q = params.Q_PTS;
    if q > n {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - q {
        let mut quadrants = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q {
            quadrants.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > params.QUADS {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, _params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let np = params.N_PTS;
    if n < 3 || np > n || np < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - np {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + np - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + np - 1];

        let same = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..np - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, params.DIST) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - a - b - 1 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let c = params.C_PTS;
    let d = params.D_PTS;
    if n < 5 || c + d > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - c - d - 1 {
        let j = i + c + 1;
        let k = j + d + 1;
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - e - f - 1 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let g = params.G_PTS;
    if n < 3 || g > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - g - 2 {
        let j = i + g + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn lic14(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_outside = false;
    let mut has_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=n - a - b - 2 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                has_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == LT || realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == EQ {
                has_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            has_outside = true;
        }
    }
    has_outside && has_inside
}

fn lic15(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..=n - e - f - 2 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn compute_cmv(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(x, y, n, params),
        lic2(x, y, n, params),
        lic3(x, y, n, params),
        lic4(x, y, n, params),
        lic5(x, y, n, params),
        lic6(x, y, n, params),
        lic7(x, y, n, params),
        lic8(x, y, n, params),
        lic9(x, y, n, params),
        lic10(x, y, n, params),
        lic11(x, y, n, params),
        lic12(x, y, n, params),
        lic13(x, y, n, params),
        lic14(x, y, n, params),
        lic15(x, y, n, params),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];

    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i != j {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = Vec::with_capacity(15);
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv.push(true);
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {

    }
}

    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x > 0.0 {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            4

    } else if x < 0.0 {

        } else {

    } else {

}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(r) =
            circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2])
        {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {

        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let q = params.Q_PTS;
    if q > n {

    for i in 0..=n - q {

        for j in 0..q {
            quadrants.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > params.QUADS {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, _params: &Parameters) -> bool {

        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let np = params.N_PTS;
    if n < 3 || np > n || np < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - np {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + np - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + np - 1];

        let same = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

            } else {

            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {

fn lic9(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {

fn lic11(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {

        }

fn lic12(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let g = params.G_PTS;
    if n < 3 || g > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }

        let j = i + g + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..n - k - 1 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn lic14(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_outside = false;
    let mut has_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=n - a - b - 2 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                has_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == LT || realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == EQ {
                has_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            has_outside = true;
        }
    }
    has_outside && has_inside
}

fn lic15(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..=n - e - f - 2 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn compute_cmv(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(x, y, n, params),
        lic2(x, y, n, params),
        lic3(x, y, n, params),
        lic4(x, y, n, params),
        lic5(x, y, n, params),
        lic6(x, y, n, params),
        lic7(x, y, n, params),
        lic8(x, y, n, params),
        lic9(x, y, n, params),
        lic10(x, y, n, params),
        lic11(x, y, n, params),
        lic12(x, y, n, params),
        lic13(x, y, n, params),
        lic14(x, y, n, params),
        lic15(x, y, n, params),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];

    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i != j {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = Vec::with_capacity(15);
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv.push(true);
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {

    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

        lic14(x, y, n, params),
        lic15(x, y, n, params),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];

    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i != j {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = Vec::with_capacity(15);
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv.push(true);
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

use std::io::{self, Read};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,
    pub Q_PTS: usize,
    pub QUADS: usize,
    pub DIST: f64,

    pub K_PTS: usize,

    pub C_PTS: usize,

    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x > 0.0 {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            4
        }
    } else if x < 0.0 {
        if y > 0.0 {
            2
        } else {
            3
        }
    } else {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            3
        }
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(r) =
            circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2])
        {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let q = params.Q_PTS;
    if q > n {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - q {
        let mut quadrants = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q {
            quadrants.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > params.QUADS {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, _params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {

    }
    false

fn lic7(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let np = params.N_PTS;
    if n < 3 || np > n || np < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - np {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + np - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + np - 1];

        let same = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..np - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];

fn lic8(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {

    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {

fn lic12(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {

}

fn lic13(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;

    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..n - k - 1 {

        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH2) == LT {

}

fn lic14(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {

}

fn lic15(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {

}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {

","filediff":{"file":"/tmp/nvp_opencode_gf01dihu/decide.rs","before":"use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::io::{self, Read};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,
    pub Q_PTS: usize,
    pub QUADS: usize,
    pub DIST: f64,
    pub N_PTS: usize,
    pub K_PTS: usize,
    pub A_PTS: usize,
    pub B_PTS: usize,
    pub C_PTS: usize,
    pub D_PTS: usize,
    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x > 0.0 {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            4
        }
    } else if x < 0.0 {
        if y > 0.0 {
            2
        } else {
            3
        }
    } else {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            3
        }
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(r) =
            circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2])
        {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let q = params.Q_PTS;
    if q > n {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - q {
        let mut quadrants = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q {
            quadrants.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > params.QUADS {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, _params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let np = params.N_PTS;
    if n < 3 || np > n || np < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - np {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + np - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + np - 1];

        let same = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..np - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, params.DIST) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - a - b - 1 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let c = params.C_PTS;
    let d = params.D_PTS;
    if n < 5 || c + d > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - c - d - 1 {
        let j = i + c + 1;
        let k = j + d + 1;
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - e - f - 1 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let g = params.G_PTS;
    if n < 3 || g > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - g - 1 {
        let j = i + g + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x > 0.0 {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            4
        }
    } else if x < 0.0 {
        if y > 0.0 {
            2
        } else {
            3
        }
    } else {
        if y >= 0.0 {
            1
        } else {
            3
        }
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    if denom < 1e-12 {

    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(r) =
            circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2])
        {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let q = params.Q_PTS;
    if q > n {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - q {
        let mut quadrants = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q {
            quadrants.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > params.QUADS {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, _params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let np = params.N_PTS;
    if n < 3 || np > n || np < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - np {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + np - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + np - 1];

        let same = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..np - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];

            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=n - k - 2 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - a - b - 2 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let c = params.C_PTS;
    let d = params.D_PTS;
    if n < 5 || c + d > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - c - d - 1 {
        let j = i + c + 1;
        let k = j + d + 1;
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - params.EPSILON;
            let upper = PI + params.EPSILON;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - e - f - 1 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(x: &[f64], _y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let g = params.G_PTS;
    if n < 3 || g > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..n - g - 1 {
        let j = i + g + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let k = params.K_PTS;
    if n < 3 || k > n - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..n - k - 1 {
        let j = i + k + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, params.LENGTH2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn lic14(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let a = params.A_PTS;
    let b = params.B_PTS;
    if n < 5 || a + b > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_outside = false;
    let mut has_inside = false;

    for i in 0..n - a - b - 1 {
        let j = i + a + 1;
        let k = j + b + 1;
        if let Some(r) = circle_radius_from_3_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS1) == GT {
                has_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == LT || realcompare(r, params.RADIUS2) == EQ {
                has_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            has_outside = true;
        }
    }
    has_outside && has_inside
}

fn lic15(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> bool {
    let e = params.E_PTS;
    let f = params.F_PTS;
    if n < 5 || e + f > n - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut has_greater = false;
    let mut has_less = false;

    for i in 0..n - e - f - 1 {
        let j = i + e + 1;
        let k = j + f + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA1) == GT {
            has_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, params.AREA2) == LT {
            has_less = true;
        }
    }
    has_greater && has_less
}

fn compute_cmv(x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n: usize, params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(x, y, n, params),
        lic2(x, y, n, params),
        lic3(x, y, n, params),
        lic4(x, y, n, params),
        lic5(x, y, n, params),
        lic6(x, y, n, params),
        lic7(x, y, n, params),
        lic8(x, y, n, params),
        lic9(x, y, n, params),
        lic10(x, y, n, params),
        lic11(x, y, n, params),
        lic12(x, y, n, params),
        lic13(x, y, n, params),
        lic14(x, y, n, params),
        lic15(x, y, n, params),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];

    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i != j {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = Vec::with_capacity(15);
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv.push(true);
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];

    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i != j {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = Vec::with_capacity(15);
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv.push(true);
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv.push(all_true);
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input.x, &input.y, input.numpoints, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() -> io::Result<()> {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str)?;

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str)?;
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output)?;
    println!("{}", output_json);

    Ok(())
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_from_3_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs())
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
